title: Clear tinted glass
body:
###CLEAR TINTED GLASS
![gLSS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3613b265a7ef515a0b90e90fe6674cb8b984cd1.png)
# Description
Perhaps your friend has tinted windows in his house, and you want to look through them without problems? Then this resource pack was created just for you, now you don't have any! obstacles before spying on a friend)
